card_name_verified: Southwest® Rapid Rewards® Premier Business Credit Card
_review_reason: All recurring benefits are points/percentage denominated, not USD statement credits — excluded per Convention C (amount must be USD value). Specifically: 6,000 anniversary bonus points (points), 10,000 Companion Pass qualifying points/year (points), 15% anniversary promo code (% off), 25% back on inflight purchases (% rebate), 2x gas/restaurants up to $8k (earning rate), Group 5 boarding (qualitative). No $ statement credits documented.
